rhythm_hint_label.description: Focus, break and cycle lengths come from presets — switch or edit them from the menu (Preset ▸).

pomodoro_duration.tooltip: Length of one focus block, in minutes (classic Pomodoro is 25).

short_break_duration.tooltip: Length of the short break after each focus block (classic is 5).

long_break_duration.tooltip: Length of the longer break after a set of pomodoros (classic is 15–30).

pomodori_number.description: Number of pomodori before long break:
pomodori_number.tooltip: How many focus blocks to complete before the long break (classic is 4).

start_automatically_on_load.description: Start the pomodoro timer as soon as the applet loads
start_automatically_on_load.tooltip: Begin a focus session as soon as Cinnamon starts or the applet is added.

session_recovery.description: Recover an in-progress focus session after a Cinnamon restart (resume manually)
session_recovery.tooltip: If Cinnamon restarts mid-focus, the session is remembered so you can resume it from the menu — it won't auto-start.

show_dialog_messages.description: Show a pop-up prompt at each phase change
show_dialog_messages.tooltip: Show pop-up dialogs at the end of each phase (off keeps it quiet — only on-screen cues).

auto_start_break.tooltip: When a focus phase ends, start the break automatically.

auto_start_pomodoro.description: Automatically start focus after a break
auto_start_pomodoro.tooltip: When a break ends, start the next focus phase automatically.

panel_icon_style.tooltip: What to show in the panel: a progress ring with the state icon inside (recommended), a plain symbolic icon, your own custom icon, or no icon at all. The timer text is a separate option below.

panel_custom_icon.tooltip: Pick your own panel icon — a theme icon name or an image file. Used when Panel icon is set to Custom icon.

show_timer.description: Show the pomodoro timer in the applet panel
show_timer.tooltip: Show the remaining time as text in the panel.

show_seconds.description: Show seconds in the panel timer
show_seconds.tooltip: Off shows only the remaining minutes on the panel (less distracting).

hotkey.tooltip: Keyboard shortcut to open or close the applet menu.

hotkey_toggle.tooltip: Keyboard shortcut to start or pause the timer.

hotkey_skip.description: Shortcut: skip to the next step
hotkey_skip.tooltip: Keyboard shortcut to skip to the next phase (focus ↔ break).

hotkey_distraction.tooltip: Keyboard shortcut to pop up a quick note for a distracting thought, without opening the menu.

start_on_click.description: Start the timer with a single click when idle
start_on_click.tooltip: When no timer is running, left-clicking the applet starts a focus session directly instead of opening the menu.

panel_scroll_control.description: Control the timer with the mouse on the panel
panel_scroll_control.tooltip: Scroll up on the applet to start or resume, scroll down to pause, and middle-click to skip the phase. Turn this off if you sometimes scroll over the panel by accident.

scroll_action.tooltip: What the mouse wheel does on the applet: start/pause the timer, or change the focus length (when idle). Middle-click always skips to the next phase.

focus_show_task_chip.description: Show the current task as an on-screen chip during focus
focus_show_task_chip.tooltip: Show the current task in a small on-screen chip while focusing.

focus_start_ritual.description: Start ritual: brief centered 'Focus: <task>' and a smooth fade-in when focus begins
focus_start_ritual.tooltip: Briefly show 'Focus: <task>' with a smooth fade-in when focus begins.

prompt_focus_task.description: Ask which task to focus on before starting
prompt_focus_task.tooltip: When off, a focus session starts immediately with your current task instead of opening the task picker. If a task is required and none is set, the picker still appears.

require_focus_task.description: Require a focus task before starting
require_focus_task.tooltip: Ask for a task name before a focus session can start.

theme_preset.tooltip: Color scheme for accents and on-screen cues. Choose Custom to set your own focus/break colors below.

accent_focus_color.tooltip: Accent color during focus (used only when the theme is Custom).

accent_break_color.tooltip: Accent color during breaks (used only when the theme is Custom).

frame_style.tooltip: Style of the on-screen frame that traces focus progress: a soft Glow, a Classic border, just the Corners, or Off.

glow_intensity.tooltip: How bright the on-screen edge glow is during focus — higher is more visible, lower is subtler.

breathing_pattern.tooltip: Breathing rhythm for the guide: Box (4-4-4-4), calming 4-7-8, or relaxed 4-6 — seconds per phase.

chip_position.tooltip: Which screen corner the on-screen task chip appears in.

menu_font_scale.tooltip: Scale the text in the menu, dialogs and statistics (100% = default size).

preview_appearance_button.tooltip: Briefly show the on-screen focus frame and task chip with the current colors and style (works when no timer is running).

preview_breathing_button.tooltip: Briefly show the breathing guide with the selected pattern.

daily_goal.tooltip: Target pomodoros per day (0 turns off the goal and streak).

task_celebration.description: Celebrate when a task is completed
task_celebration.tooltip: A short celebration when you complete a task that met its 🍅 estimate (or earned at least one). Confetti respects reduce-motion.

task_celebration_preview_button.tooltip: Play the task-completion celebration once to see how it looks.

auto_pause_idle.description: Auto-pause focus when you are away (idle)
auto_pause_idle.tooltip: Pause focus automatically when you step away from the computer.

auto_pause_idle_minutes.tooltip: How long you can be away before focus auto-pauses, in minutes.

auto_resume_on_activity.tooltip: Resume a paused focus session automatically when you return to the computer.

flow_extend.description: Offer to extend focus when a pomodoro ends (stay in flow)
flow_extend.tooltip: When a pomodoro ends, offer to extend it to stay in flow. Only applies when the next phase doesn't start automatically.

flow_extend_minutes.tooltip: How many extra minutes the 'extend focus' option adds.

flow_soft_landing.description: Soft landing: don't break focus while you're still working
flow_soft_landing.tooltip: When a focus pomodoro ends while you're actively working, hold the break until a natural pause instead of interrupting you. Off by default; only applies when the next phase doesn't start automatically.

flow_soft_landing_behavior.description: When focus ends and you're still working
flow_soft_landing_behavior.tooltip: Wait: hold quietly at the end until you pause, then offer the break. Quietly extend: silently add focus time (the 'Extend amount' above) and keep going, re-checking each time.

focus_ambient_choice.tooltip: Loop a calming sound during focus. White/pink/brown noise and rain/sea are built in; pick "Custom file" to use your own.

focus_ambient_sound.description: Play an ambient sound during focus
focus_ambient_sound.tooltip: Loop a soft ambient sound during focus — the built-in brown noise, or your own file below.

focus_ambient_volume.tooltip: Volume of the ambient sound (0 = silent).

focus_ambient_preview_button.tooltip: Loop a preview of the chosen ambient sound; drag the volume slider to adjust it live.

break_breathing.description: Show a breathing guide during breaks
break_breathing.tooltip: During breaks, show an expanding and contracting circle that paces your breathing to help you unwind.

break_lock_enabled.tooltip: When a break starts, show a brief warning and then lock the screen so you actually step away. Never locks during focus; off by default.

break_lock_long_only.tooltip: Only lock for the longer breaks, not every short break.

zen_mode_enabled.description: Enable Zen mode (focus spotlight — dims other windows, toggled from the menu)
zen_mode_enabled.tooltip: Allow the focus spotlight, toggled from the menu: while focusing, the other windows dim so the one you're working in stands out.

zen_dim_strength.tooltip: How much to darken the other windows while a focus session runs (higher = darker).

zen_dim_desktop.description: Zen spotlight: also dim the desktop wallpaper
zen_dim_desktop.tooltip: Darken the desktop background too, not just the other windows.

strict_focus.description: Strict focus: no pause or skip during a focus block
strict_focus.tooltip: While a focus block is running, hide pause and skip so you commit to it. You can still Reset to abandon the session — it's never a hard lock.

focus_dnd.description: Mute notifications while focusing (Do Not Disturb)
focus_dnd.tooltip: Mute Cinnamon notifications while focusing; restored afterwards.

pause_media.description: Pause music & video on breaks and pauses
pause_media.tooltip: Pauses any playing media (browser tab, music app via MPRIS) when a break or pause starts, and resumes the same players when focus continues.

run_command_enabled.description: Run a command when focus or a break starts
run_command_enabled.tooltip: Run a command of your choice when focus or a break starts.

focus_start_command.description: Command to run when focus starts
focus_start_command.tooltip: Pick a script to run when a focus block starts (e.g. enable Do Not Disturb). You can also type a command.

break_start_command.description: Command to run when a break starts
break_start_command.tooltip: Pick a script to run when a break starts (e.g. clear your status). You can also type a command.

goal_command.description: Command to run when the daily goal is reached
goal_command.tooltip: Pick a script to run when you reach your daily goal (e.g. a small celebration). You can also type a command.

pushover_enabled.description: Send push notifications to your phone (Pushover)
pushover_enabled.tooltip: Send a push notification to your devices via Pushover when focus or breaks start.

pushover_help.description: Free phone/desktop alerts. Sign up at pushover.net and paste your keys below.

pushover_user_key.tooltip: Your Pushover user key (from your Pushover account).

pushover_app_token.tooltip: API token of your Pushover application (create one at pushover.net).

pushover_test_button.tooltip: Send a test message now to confirm your user key and app token work.

pushover_customize.tooltip: Show options to change the text, sound and priority for each event. Off uses sensible defaults.

pushover_title.tooltip: Title shown on the push notifications.

pushover_msg_focus.tooltip: Sent when a focus session starts. {task} and {minutes} are substituted. Leave empty to send nothing.

pushover_msg_resume.tooltip: Sent when a break finishes. Leave empty to send no message.

enable_blocking.tooltip: When on, the sites below are blocked right now and stay blocked until you turn this off. Run "Set up passwordless blocking" once so toggling doesn't ask for a password. Note: a browser using secure DNS (DoH) can bypass /etc/hosts blocking — disable the browser's secure DNS for it to take effect.

block_domains.tooltip: Domains to block while blocking is on, one per row (e.g. youtube.com, www.youtube.com).

blocking_auth_mode.tooltip: How the one-time setup configures the pkexec policy: never ask (passwordless, convenient), or ask once per login session (safer — a stray process can't then toggle blocking silently). Re-run "Set up passwordless blocking" after changing this.

sox-info.description: No sound backend found — install GSound or a player like pulseaudio-utils.

timer_sound.tooltip: Play a soft ticking sound while focusing.

timer_sound_file.tooltip: Sound file for the ticking (leave empty for the built-in tone).

timer_sound_volume.tooltip: Volume of the ticking sound (0 = silent).

break_sound.description: Play a sound when a break starts
break_sound.tooltip: Play a sound when a break begins.

break_sound_file.tooltip: Sound file played when a break begins.

break_sound_volume.tooltip: Volume of the break sound (0 = silent).

warn_sound.description: Play a warning before focus ends
warn_sound.tooltip: Play a warning sound shortly before a focus block ends.

warn_sound_delay.tooltip: How many seconds before the end the warning sound plays.

warn_sound_file.tooltip: Sound file used for the warning.

warn_sound_volume.tooltip: Volume of the warning sound (0 = silent).

start_sound.description: Play a sound when focus starts
start_sound.tooltip: Play a sound when a focus block starts.

start_sound_file.tooltip: Sound file played when focus starts.

start_sound_volume.tooltip: Volume of the start sound (0 = silent).

interval_chime.description: Play a chime at a regular interval during focus
interval_chime.tooltip: Play a sound at a fixed interval during focus to mark time passing.

interval_chime_file.tooltip: Sound file used for the interval chime.

interval_chime_volume.tooltip: Volume of the interval chime (0 = silent).

timer_sound_test.tooltip: Loop a preview of the ticking sound; drag the volume slider to adjust it live.

custom_presets.description: Your custom presets. Apply one from the Preset submenu in the applet menu.
custom_presets.tooltip: Your timer presets — name + focus / short / long minutes + pomodori. Apply them from the menu's Preset submenu.

setup_passwordless_button.tooltip: Asks for your password once and installs a small system policy so blocking no longer prompts during focus.

remove_passwordless_button.tooltip: Removes the system policy and the root helper, so blocking asks for your password again each time.

about_technique_button.tooltip: A short explanation of how the Pomodoro technique works.

restore_onboarding_button.tooltip: Restore your settings from just before the last time you applied a setup from the guide.

pushover_msg_short_break.description: Message when a short break starts
pushover_msg_short_break.tooltip: Sent when a short break begins. {task} and {minutes} are substituted. Leave empty to send nothing.

pushover_msg_long_break.description: Message when a long break starts
pushover_msg_long_break.tooltip: Sent when a long break begins. {task} and {minutes} are substituted. Leave empty to send nothing.

pushover_msg_goal.description: Message when the daily goal is reached
pushover_msg_goal.tooltip: Sent once when you hit your daily pomodoro goal. {task} and {minutes} are substituted. Leave empty to send nothing.

pushover_reminder.description: Remind before focus or break ends
pushover_reminder.tooltip: Send a Pushover push shortly before a focus block or break ends, so you can wrap up or get ready to come back.

pushover_reminder_phase.tooltip: Whether the reminder fires before a break ends (to come back), before focus ends (to wrap up), or both.

pushover_reminder_minutes.tooltip: How many minutes before it ends to send the reminder.

pushover_msg_reminder.tooltip: Sent before the phase ends. {task} and {minutes} (minutes left) are substituted. Leave empty to send nothing.

pushover_sound_help.description: Preview each sound (play buttons) at https://pushover.net/api#sounds

focus_ambient_file.tooltip: Pick your own looping ambient sound. Leave empty for the built-in soft brown noise.
